{"society_power": 1.3, "state_power": 4.5, "society_change": -0.7, "state_change": 2.0, "key_event": "Rubber-quota terror and Force Publique consolidate despotic extraction", "reasoning": "The rubber boom, expanded Force Publique, and hostage/quota systems massively strengthened the predatory Free State's coercive reach and revenue, while demographic collapse, co-opted chieftaincies, and suppressed mutinies eviscerated indigenous society's capacity to organize\u2014the only real counter-pressure being external (Casement, Congo Reform Association), not domestic."}
